things.name: Le Morne Brabant
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage basalt peninsula - symbol of slave resistance with stunning lagoon

things.name: Aapravasi Ghat
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage immigration depot where 500,000 indentured labourers arrived

things.name: Port Louis Market (Central Market)
things.description: Spice, textile and street food market in an 1886 Victorian iron-frame market hall

things.name: Caudan Waterfront
things.description: Renovated waterfront with restaurants, the Blue Penny Museum and a casino

things.name: Blue Penny Museum
things.description: Two of the world's rarest stamps - the original 1847 'Post Office' Mauritius issues

things.name: Natural History Museum
things.description: Skeleton of the dodo bird - the extinct flightless bird endemic to Mauritius

things.name: Pamplemousses Botanical Garden
things.description: One of the oldest botanical gardens in the Southern Hemisphere with giant Victoria water lilies

things.name: Chamarel Coloured Earths
things.description: Seven-coloured volcanic earth landscape with the highest waterfall on the island

things.name: Dolphin Watching at Tamarin Bay
things.description: Swim with wild spinner dolphins in the warm turquoise waters off the west coast

things.name: Dholl Puri
things.description: Mauritius's most popular street food - split pea flatbread with rougaille sauce
